name: Jeff Weaver, Bernie 2016
subject: The moment of the debate
body:
#
Friend -
There's still a bit of time left to go before the end of the debate, but Bernie just delivered the defining moment of the evening.
The moderator asked about the Affordable Care Act, and Senator Sanders talked about how the legislation was a step in the right direction, but that we must go further. Bernie said, "I want to end the international embarrassment of the United States being the only country in the industrialized world that does not guarantee health care as a right and not a privilege."
The crowd went nuts -- one of the only times in this debate that happened.
If you believe, like Bernie does, that this is not the time to think small -- that what is required in this moment is a political revolution that takes our democracy back from establishment politicians and the billionaire class buying our elections and profiting off our health -- **then make a contribution of $28.54 (the average donation made to our campaign) before Bernie steps off the stage:**
[**https://go.berniesanders.com/debate-night**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb27a7/43f17890/50bf4a01/621e7fbc/1007866705/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/tonights_debate?refcode=em151114ec-ND")
Here's the truth: this campaign is not a soap opera or a football game. It's about the American people and the ideas and proposals that effectively address their needs.
[**Chip in and show your support for Bernie tonight.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb27a7/43f17890/50bf4a01/621e7fbc/1007866705/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/tonights_debate?refcode=em151114ec-ND")
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb27a7/43f17890/50bf4a01/621e7fbd/1007866705/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/tonights_debate?refcode=em151114fp-ND")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb27a7/43f17890/50bf4a01/621e7fba/1007866705/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb27a7/43f17890/50bf4a01/621e7fbb/1007866705/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb27a7/43f17890/50bf4a01/621e7fb8/1007866705/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb27a7/43f17890/50bf4a01/621e7fb9/1007866705/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: We are going to win
body:
#
I just walked off the debate stage and I am more certain than ever: **we are going to win.**
Our country is at a moment of truth. The middle class is disappearing and more than half of new income is going to the top 1%. The rich are getting richer and using their wealth to buy elections. And the American people are looking for an alternative to endless war that has destabilized the Middle East and given rise to new threats.
This moment requires us to think differently about our challenges. The same old establishment ideas won't do. But charting a new course will require the active participation of millions of Americans in every community in our country.
So I need to ask you directly:
[**Make a contribution of $28.54 -- the average donation made to our campaign -- as a way of saying you have had ENOUGH of the billionaire class buying our elections.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb27a8/43f17890/508dcad9/621e7e37/1694910440/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/tonights_debate?refcode=em151114ND")
The billionaire class has never dealt with a threat like ours. And I am sure that if we stand together, we will win.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb27a8/43f17890/508dcad9/621e7e37/1694910440/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/tonights_debate?refcode=em151114ND")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb27a8/43f17890/508dcad9/621e7e32/1694910440/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb27a8/43f17890/508dcad9/621e7e33/1694910440/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Rick Santorum
subject: Stop Hillary now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
body:
| [ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151114_s&n=1)
---
Friend --
I’m sorry to be emailing you on a Saturday night, but I just watched the Democrat debate and I had to get this off my chest. Just yesterday, hundreds of our French allies – average citizens like you and me – were murdered on the streets of Paris by radical Islamists. And what did Hillary Clinton do? She released a warm and fuzzy statement calling for the defeat of “violent extremists.” Violent extremists? No, we are at war with radical Islam! Radical Islamists hate everything we stand for. They stand for hatred and oppression. We stand for freedom and liberty, and they seek to destroy us and our way of life. Hillary Clinton does not understand the world in which we live, the threats that we face, and the ideology of our enemy. Commander-in-Chief is not an entry level position and the Oval Office is no place for on the job training. I served for 8 years on the Armed Services Committee. I wrote the sanctions against Iran and Syria that Barack Obama is trying to dismantle. And I am not afraid to level with the American people about the threats we face or the sacrifices needed to defeat radical Islam. We must elect a President who understands the World in which live and what it will take make sure our children live in a free and safe nation. [**Join me in this fight today!**](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fricksantorum-join-the-fight%3Fsc%3D20151114-s&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151114_s&n=2)
God Bless,

Rick Santorum

[ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fricksantorum%3Fsc%3D20151114-s&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151114_s&n=3)

Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you, so if you have any thoughts on anything at all, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/contact?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151114_s&n=4) and let us know. We believe that email is one of the best ways to stay in touch with our supporters, but you can [click here if you would like to unsubscribe](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151114_s&n=5) from these messages.

If you’re not interested in continuing to receive email updates, there are other ways to stay involved. You can follow our campaign on [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ffacebook.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151114_s&n=6), [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151114_s&n=7), or [Instagram](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Finstagram.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151114_s&n=8).

**Thank you so much for everything you’re doing to help us reclaim the American Dream for hardworking families.**

Santorum for President 2016, PO Box 238, Verona, PA 15147

[Privacy Policy](http://www.ricksantorum.com/privacy?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151114_s&n=9)

name: Jeb Bush
subject: US must lead war against ISIS and radical Islamic terrorism
body:
Friend - This morning on NBC's Meet the Press, I spoke about the horrific terrorist attacks that shook the heart of Paris and called for a comprehensive strategy to defeat ISIS and other radical Islamic terrorists. I wanted to make sure you saw it:

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/lkgpsdhcqnjrzlzmrdypqrflhhrfclscpdwdjclkqkzn_ksdvvfpt.html).
These attacks are a stark reminder of the serious threat we face. The Obama Administration's approach has been weak and incremental, too often viewing terrorism as a law enforcement problem. We need to treat it as a war -- to take the fight to the enemy.

There are those that think this is not our fight. Just last night, Hillary Clinton made that claim on national TV. Let there be no mistake, this is our fight. This is an organized effort to destroy Western Civilization and we must defeat it.

Developing a strategy is the first step in that process. Right now, we don't have one. A policy of containment will never destroy ISIS or end the conflict in Syria that is fueling radicalism.

The strategy must start with a no-fly zone over Syria and safe zones in the region for refugees -- all built with a coalition of our allies in Europe and the Middle East.

For generations, American-led alliances have defended freedom. This is the way forward, led by a president who is resolute - as I will be - in the defeat of radical Islamic terrorism wherever it appears.

Jeb
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=5571&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

name: Bill Clinton
subject: Hey -- she was great
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Wasn't she amazing? | Friend --

Hillary was great in last night’s debate. I’m so proud of her.

She showed just how good she is at making her case, but she’s even better at getting things done and making people’s lives better.

American families need her in the White House -- **[if you agree, chip in $1 right now to help her get there.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjM5OTM5MzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxNDUwNTE3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

There’s a lot that’s going well in this country, but there’s a lot more work still to do. We need to raise wages, grow our economy, and create jobs. We need to make sure our children can attend college and not be crushed by debt. We need to make affordable childcare available and ensure equal pay for women.

These are the things Hillary’s fighting for. She knows that when you’re talking about equal pay and affordable childcare and college tuition, you’re talking about how to make our economy stronger -- for everyone. That’s exactly what she’ll do as president.

It’s time for us to take our politics seriously, stop running each other down, and start building everybody up. That’s what Hillary’s about, and that’s what this election is about. We need you to be a part of that.

**Chip in $1 right now, and let’s get this done together:** | [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjM5OTM5MzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxNDUwNTE3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Thanks,

Bill

Box 5256, New York, NY 10185 [Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjM5OTM5MzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxNDUwNTE3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
clean_body: Wasn't she amazing? | Friend -- Hillary was great in last night’s debate. I’m so proud of her. She showed just how good she is at making her case, but she’s even better at getting things done and making people’s lives better. American families need her in the White House -- There’s a lot that’s going well in this country, but there’s a lot more work still to do. We need to raise wages, grow our economy, and create jobs. We need to make sure our children can attend college and not be crushed by debt. We need to make affordable childcare available and ensure equal pay for women. These are the things Hillary’s fighting for. She knows that when you’re talking about equal pay and affordable childcare and college tuition, you’re talking about how to make our economy stronger -- for everyone. That’s exactly what she’ll do as president. It’s time for us to take our politics seriously, stop running each other down, and start building everybody up. That’s what Hillary’s about, and that’s what this election is about. We need you to be a part of that. Chip in $1 right now, and let’s get this done together: | Thanks, Bill Did someone forward this email to you? | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit . Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click to receive less email and click to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on , , and . Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español . If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. ! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president. Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185

name: Beth Hansen, Campaign Manager
subject: The Latest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
Memo: Update from the Trail
From: Beth Hansen, Campaign Manager

Before we get into the campaign update, our entire
campaign team wishes to express our condolences to the victims of
the savage terrorist attacks in Paris. Our hearts were broken by
this news and it further strengthens our resolve to elect a
leader who has the experience to lead a coalition of nations to
defeat ISIS.

Gov. John Kasich spoke about the attacks and how America
should respond. Watch his remarks:

Read more: John Kasich calls for the U.S. to immediately
work with allies to destroy ISIS in the wake of the Paris
attacks.

While in Laconia, N.H. when news broke about the attacks,
Gov. Kasich led a prayer and spoke about how we can make America
safer. Watch here:

The CBS Democrat Presidential Debate (11/14/15):
What America heard last evening were plans to expand the
federal government's role even more than we've seen under
President Obama. They want to raise taxes. They want to reduce
the size of our military. And they want to continue to take
power, money & influence away from Americans to pay for their big
government programs.
The last thing America needs is more government and
higher taxes. If you haven't reviewed Gov. John Kasich's plan to
balance America's budget and restore power to the American
people, please review it at: JohnKasich.com/ResultsNow

The Fox Business GOP Presidential Debate (11/10/15):

With fewer participants, John Kasich was able to speak
more often and used his time to explain his plans to get
America's economy moving again and how by taking power out of
Washington and returning it to the states, we can better invest
in our roads and our communities. Watch this short highlight
video:

Earlier in the day, Gov. Kasich warmed up for the debate
(literally!) by attending a practice and playing basketball with
the Milwaukee Bucks:

Also, congratulations to Mike & Gail, our debate contest
winners! I enjoyed visiting with them while in Milwaukee:

Endorsements:

• Former Colorado U.S. Senator Ben Nighthorse
Campbell (read more)

• Former Ohio Governor and U.S. Senator George
Voinovich

• Michigan State Senator Wayne Schmidt and State
Representative Jason Sheppard

• Mississippi - Gulfport Mayor Billy Hewes and
Hattiesburg Legislator Toby Barker

Illinois:

On Monday, Gov. Kasich was in Chicago for a fundraising
reception and to attend a debate kickoff rally with #TeamKasich
supporters at the iconic Billy Goat Tavern.

South Carolina:

Gov. Kasich was in West Columbia to attend a town hall
with voters and then visited Hilton Head to participate in a
presidential candidate town hall hosted by Sen. Tim Scott.

New Hampshire:

On Thursday and Friday, Gov. Kasich was in New Hampshire
to attend town hall events in Exeter, Hudson & Laconia and also
to participate in a show hosted by New Hampshire Public Radio.

Florida:

Governor Kasich was in Orlando on Saturday to participate
in the Republican Party of Florida's 'Sunshine Summit' - The link
to watch the Governor's remarks are at the top of this email.

Other News Coverage:

• Fox News "Hannity" 1111/15 (watch here)

• Fox News "Sunday Morning Futures" 11/15/15 (watch
here)

• Golf Channel - "Morning Drive" - Aired 11/15/15
(watch here)

Upcoming Travel:

Gov. Kasich will travel to Massachusetts on Tuesday for
fundraising events, to Virginia on Wednesday for fundraising
events and to participate in a presidential candidate series at
Regent University. He'll be in South Carolina on Thursday for
events with voters in Spartanburg & Charleston before traveling
to New York on Friday for a fundraising event and then on to New
Hampshire for two town halls and a house party.

Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/isoqbNAybN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/osoqbNAybN

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-30434540588-echo3-8BE3A24FFD130EE1C3A0C0EEA066ABFF@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Sen. Gordon Humphrey
subject: John Is A Fighter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEW DAY FOR AMERICA NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
| [](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=35444401&msgid=107374&act=N28F&c=1559159&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.newdayforamerica.com%2Fdonate) Dear Friend, John Kasich has just finished a strong week here in New Hampshire. He was at the top of his game. Friday night, there was an overflow crowd at the Laconia Town Hall Meeting and John was magnificent. I am certain 90 percent of voters in the room went home inspired and intent on voting for him. **John is working his heart out**. The campaign in New Hampshire is well-organized and doing great work. That’s why they had to set up extra chairs. Here’s what [_The Columbus Dispatch_](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=35444401&msgid=107374&act=N28F&c=1559159&destination=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.dispatch.com%2Fcontent%2Fstories%2Flocal%2F2015%2F11%2F13%2Fnew-hampshire-kasich-balanced-budget.html) said about attendance: _Shortly before the New Hampshire event, aides were seen packing away 10 chairs_ _— a sign that attendance was falling short of expectations. Later that night, though,_ _they brought in dozens more chairs, as nearly 100 packed into a room in northern New Hampshire. _ **_“If you like me, please help me,”_** _he implored the crowd at the end of the event._ [](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=35444401&msgid=107374&act=N28F&c=1559159&destination=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.newdayforamerica.com%2Fdonate) John’s closing appeal — _If you like me, please help me. — _touched my heart. I know this exceptionally fine man touches your heart, too. He’s maintaining an inhuman schedule, depriving himself of the comforts of family, enduring outrageous insults and misfortunes — in a word, sacrificing. Sacrificing for the right reasons. You know John. He’s not in this for ego. His heart and soul are simply too noble for that. In the context of the massacres in Paris, the following needs to be said: **John is a fighter**. At a time when barbarism, inhumanity, lawlessness and utter madness are on the march again as in no time since the 1930s, _we need a Winston Churchill_. Wise. Principled. Inspiring. Courageous. Resolute. **John is that person**. The massacres underscore the vital importance of electing a _seriously qualified_ , experienced president — not merely someone who can make a good speech. We must have a president who will lead. Someone who has, can and will get the job done in Washington, restoring America’s economic and military strength, restoring America’s self-confidence, restoring America’s leadership in the world for all that is good. John’s intellect and ideas are first rate and his real-world experience — Budget Committee Chairman, 18 years on the Armed Services Committee and now acclaimed Governor of the nation’s seventh largest state – renders him, by far, the **best-qualified candidate for the office of President of the United States and Commander-in-Chief of our Armed Forces.** Let John’s closing words in Laconia work on your heart today as they are working on mine: _If you like me, please help me._ This is an appeal to you to increase your contribution to New Day for America, as I have just done. Now. Not later. As John is leading, we must lead. You and I. Now. Anyone can postpone and defer, waiting to see how things will shake out. We — you and I — must act now, we must write history, not react to it after the fact. The situation here in New Hampshire is fluid. John’s polling in the top tier and _he can win_. With New Day’s effective help, with your help and mine, _we can win here_. Let’s. A fateful moment is upon America, upon you and upon me. Let us rise to the historic challenge. Warmest regards, **Gordon Humphrey**
Former United States Senator
Concord, New Hampshire | Please [click here](https://app.icontact.com/icp/mmail-mprofile.pl?r=35444401&l=20193&s=N28F&m=107374&c=1559159) if you wish to unsubscribe to these emails.
---
PAID FOR BY NEW DAY FOR AMERICA NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
[NEWDAYFORAMERICA.COM](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=35444401&msgid=107374&act=N28F&c=1559159&destination=http%3A%2F%2Fnewdayforamerica.com%2F) CONTRIBUTIONS TO NEW DAY FOR AMERICA ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE AS CHARITABLE CONTRIBUTIONS FOR FEDERAL INCOME TAX PURPOSES.
---

This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com from: Sen. Gordon Humphrey | info@newdayforamerica.com | New Day For America | 4679 Winterset Drive | Columbus, OH 43220 | Email Marketing by [](http://www.icontact.com/a.pl/144186)
---|---
[ Unsubscribe ](http://app.icontact.com/icp/mmail-mprofile.pl?r=35444401&l=20193&s=N28F&m=107374&c=1559159)

name: Team Murphy
subject: BREAKING: Dead heat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

I'll give you the bad news first. Another poll just came out. And it has Patrick slightly behind Republican David Jolly in the race for Senate.

**This race is as close as it gets.**

Now, here's the good news. In other battleground states -- Wisconsin, Ohio, and Colorado -- the Democrats are either slightly ahead or tied. **This confirms what we 've known and what Bloomberg Business said: "The war for the Senate will be decided in Florida."**

We need to take the lead so Democrats can reclaim the Senate majority. Now is the time for action. Let's show the rest of the country that FLORIDA'S GOT THIS.

[**We need to seize this moment and help Patrick start surging ahead. Can you pitch in $5 or more? Democrats are depending on us.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae212d/738133e4/3a3f6729/7f834b70/3525851676/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151113?refcode=pme151113_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

With Congress under Republican control, it's been a bumpy road for the American people.

In the past few months alone, we've been pushed to the brink of default. We've narrowly avoided a government shutdown -- and we're coming up on another.

Oh, and in case you were wondering what continued Republican control of the Senate would be like, I think their efforts to strip federal funding from Planned Parenthood are pretty telling.

Let's put someone in office who won't threaten women's access to health care. Someone who will protect Medicare, Social Security, our natural resources, and every hard working American's right to earn a living wage.

[**Let 's put Patrick in the Senate with a Democratic majority behind him. Help him get to the Senate by giving what you can right now.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae212d/738133e4/3a3f6729/7f834b70/3525851676/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151113?refcode=pme151113_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Thank you,

Team Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae212d/738133e4/3a3f6729/7f834b71/3525851676/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
